g.text: Comparable 2023-2025 above-embedded vintages only; 2022 total-adjustment vintage excluded from inference. Five of seven revisions are upward (one-sided sign test p=0.23).

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Times New Roman', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Comparable forecast revisions show material non-stationarity, not a significant ratchet
